name: 05-19-stage1-generic-typed-rvv-body-surface
title: Stage1 generic typed RVV body-surface replacement
description: Build the minimal generic typed low-level tcrv_rvv route-surface skeleton consumed by the RVV plugin provider, replacing finite i32m1 route authority with typed body/config/memory/runtime facts.
creator: codex
notes: Partial coherent submodule complete: generic !tcrv_rvv.vector plus load/binary/store surface is wired through provider, focused tests pass, and pre-realized add/sub/mul realization now produces generic selected-body dataflow. Task remains open because active-authority scan still finds explicit legacy i32 add/sub/mul artifact fixtures/provider compatibility and source-front-door residue that must be fail-closed or migrated before Stage1 can be claimed complete.
